description: Style NotePure police Contemporary, for men, is available in a white flacon. Product DetailsPure Police Contemporary has notes of bergamot, grapefruit, juniper, lavender, rosemary, peppermint, jasmine, geranium, violet, clary sage, sandalwood, cedar, moss, musk and tonka beanCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSize50 ml
